text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin's debut race is here, and her younger
twin sisters have come to show their support.
She's the very definition of a responsible older
sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Encouraged by a cute dance performance from
her sisters, Ines Fujin feels ready to make them
proud and do her best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no telling what will happen in the race
ahead. With her heart pounding, Ines Fujin is
about to make her debut!
